requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety & Voltage/Frequency Match (220/380 V, 50 Hz)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全及电压/频率匹配（220/380 V，50 Hz）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全及電壓/頻率匹配（220/380 V，50 Hz）

summary.en: Uzbekistan's mains supply is nominally 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz. Electrical safety for LED luminaires is assessed against O'zDSt standards adopting IEC 60598 （luminaires）and IEC 62560 （self-ballasted LED lamps）within the O'zStandart conformity certification or declaration, covering protection against electric shock, insulation, temperature limits, creepage and clearance, and earthing where applicable. Because Uzbekistan's 220/380 V 50 Hz nominal is the same as China's, an LED luminaire designed and rated for the Chinese grid is generally electrically suitable for Uzbekistan without input re-rating — the input-voltage/frequency engineering is a genuine match. The remaining work is presenting the safety evidence against the O'zDSt-adopted IEC editions through the O'zStandart route. Confirm the plug/connection type and any installation-wiring expectations for the destination market.
summary.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦市电标称为 220 V 单相/380 V 三相、50 Hz。LED 灯具的电气安全在 O'zStandart 合格认证或声明内，依据采用 IEC 60598（灯具）及 IEC 62560（自镇流 LED 灯）的 O'zDSt 标准评定，涵盖防触电保护、绝缘、温度限值、爬电距离与电气间隙，以及适用的接地。由于乌兹别克斯坦 220/380 V 50 Hz 标称值与中国相同，为中国电网设计及额定的 LED 灯具通常在电气上适用于乌兹别克斯坦，无需输入重新降额——输入电压/频率工程为真正匹配。剩余工作是通过 O'zStandart 路径、依据 O'zDSt 采纳的 IEC 版本呈现安全证据。请确认目的地市场的插头/连接类型及任何安装布线要求。
summary.zht: 烏茲別克市電標稱為 220 V 單相/380 V 三相、50 Hz。LED 燈具的電氣安全在 O'zStandart 合格認證或聲明內，依據採用 IEC 60598（燈具）及 IEC 62560（自鎮流 LED 燈）的 O'zDSt 標準評定，涵蓋防觸電保護、絕緣、溫度限值、爬電距離與電氣間隙，以及適用的接地。由於烏茲別克 220/380 V 50 Hz 標稱值與中國相同，為中國電網設計及額定的 LED 燈具通常在電氣上適用於烏茲別克，無需輸入重新降額——輸入電壓/頻率工程為真正匹配。剩餘工作是通過 O'zStandart 路徑、依據 O'zDSt 採納的 IEC 版本呈現安全證據。請確認目的地市場的插頭/連接類型及任何安裝布線要求。

standards_or_laws: O'zDSt adoptions of IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 — electrical safety of luminaires and self-ballasted LED lamps
Uzbekistan mains: 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz (matches China nominal)

summary.en: China's mains supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz — identical nominal to Uzbekistan. Electrical safety is assessed against GB 7000 series （aligned to IEC 60598）and GB 24906/GB 19510-type standards for LED lamp/control-gear safety （aligned to IEC 62560 / IEC 61347）, verified within CCC for in-scope luminaires. Because the grid is the same, a China-market design needs no electrical re-rating for Uzbekistan; the difference is the conformity scheme （GB/CCC vs O'zDSt/O'zStandart）, not the electrical engineering.
summary.zh: 中国市电为 220 V 单相/380 V 三相、50 Hz——与乌兹别克斯坦标称值相同。电气安全依据 GB 7000 系列（对接 IEC 60598）及 GB 24906/GB 19510 类 LED 灯/控制装置安全标准（对接 IEC 62560 / IEC 61347）评定，对于纳入范围的灯具在 CCC 内核验。由于电网相同，面向中国市场的设计无需为乌兹别克斯坦重新电气降额；差异在合格制度（GB/CCC vs O'zDSt/O'zStandart），而非电气工程。
summary.zht: 中國市電為 220 V 單相/380 V 三相、50 Hz——與烏茲別克標稱值相同。電氣安全依據 GB 7000 系列（對接 IEC 60598）及 GB 24906/GB 19510 類 LED 燈/控制裝置安全標準（對接 IEC 62560 / IEC 61347）評定，對於納入範圍的燈具在 CCC 內核驗。由於電網相同，面向中國市場的設計無需為烏茲別克重新電氣降額；差異在合格制度（GB/CCC vs O'zDSt/O'zStandart），而非電氣工程。

standards_or_laws: GB 7000 series — luminaire electrical safety (aligned to IEC 60598)
GB 24906 / GB 19510 — LED lamp and control-gear safety (aligned to IEC 62560 / IEC 61347)

gap.en: This is a low-gap area technically because the 220/380 V 50 Hz grids are identical — no input re-rating, transformer change, or frequency redesign is required to move a China-market LED luminaire to Uzbekistan. The gap is conformity-scheme and documentary, not electrical: (1) the safety evidence must reference the O'zDSt-adopted IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 editions within an O'zStandart certification or declaration, and CN GB/CCC reports are not automatically accepted （an IEC CB-scheme report can often be leveraged）; (2) confirm the destination plug/connection type and any installation-wiring or earthing expectation; (3) confirm whether mandatory certification or a declaration is the route for the product category. The voltage/frequency match is a genuine advantage versus markets with different grids, but it does not remove the O'zStandart conformity obligation.
gap.zh: 此领域技术上差距较低，因为 220/380 V 50 Hz 电网完全相同——将面向中国市场的 LED 灯具移至乌兹别克斯坦无需输入重新降额、变压器更换或频率重新设计。差距在合格制度及文件，而非电气：（1）安全证据须在 O'zStandart 认证或声明内引用 O'zDSt 采纳的 IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 版本，且中国 GB/CCC 报告不被自动接受（IEC CB 体系报告通常可加以利用）；（2）确认目的地插头/连接类型及任何安装布线或接地要求；（3）确认产品类别的路径为强制认证还是声明。电压/频率匹配相对于电网不同的市场是真正优势，但并不免除 O'zStandart 合格义务。
gap.zht: 此領域技術上差距較低，因為 220/380 V 50 Hz 電網完全相同——將面向中國市場的 LED 燈具移至烏茲別克無需輸入重新降額、變壓器更換或頻率重新設計。差距在合格制度及文件，而非電氣：（1）安全證據須在 O'zStandart 認證或聲明內引用 O'zDSt 採納的 IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 版本，且中國 GB/CCC 報告不被自動接受（IEC CB 體系報告通常可加以利用）；（2）確認目的地插頭/連接類型及任何安裝布線或接地要求；（3）確認產品類別的路徑為強制認證還是聲明。電壓/頻率匹配相對於電網不同的市場是真正優勢，但並不免除 O'zStandart 合格義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (within conformity assessment) — electrical safety against O'zDSt-adopted IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 required via O'zStandart certification or declaration; 220/380 V 50 Hz matches China so no input re-rating generally needed
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 7000 / GB 24906 electrical safety verified within CCC for in-scope luminaires; 220/380 V 50 Hz grid

source.publisher: O'zStandart — Uzbek Agency for Technical Regulation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Uzbekistan's 220/380 V 50 Hz grid matches China's nominal, so a China-market LED luminaire generally needs no input re-rating — this is a genuine engineering advantage. The remaining obligation is conformity: present electrical-safety evidence against the O'zDSt-adopted IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 editions within an O'zStandart certification or declaration （CN GB/CCC reports are not automatically accepted; an IEC CB report can help）, and confirm the plug/connection type and route （certification vs declaration） for the product category.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌兹别克斯坦 220/380 V 50 Hz 电网与中国标称值匹配，故面向中国市场的 LED 灯具通常无需输入重新降额——这是真正的工程优势。剩余义务在合格性：在 O'zStandart 认证或声明内提供依据 O'zDSt 采纳的 IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 版本的电气安全证据（中国 GB/CCC 报告不被自动接受；IEC CB 报告有所帮助），并确认产品类别的插头/连接类型及路径（认证还是声明）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏茲別克 220/380 V 50 Hz 電網與中國標稱值匹配，故面向中國市場的 LED 燈具通常無需輸入重新降額——這是真正的工程優勢。剩餘義務在合格性：在 O'zStandart 認證或聲明內提供依據 O'zDSt 採納的 IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 版本的電氣安全證據（中國 GB/CCC 報告不被自動接受；IEC CB 報告有所幫助），並確認產品類別的插頭/連接類型及路徑（認證還是聲明）。

requirement_topic.en: Performance, Marking and Self-Ballasted LED Lamp Conformity (IEC 62560 / IEC 60598)
requirement_topic.zh: 性能、标识及自镇流 LED 灯合格性（IEC 62560 / IEC 60598）
requirement_topic.zht: 性能、標識及自鎮流 LED 燈合格性（IEC 62560 / IEC 60598）

summary.en: Beyond core electrical safety, LED lamps and luminaires for Uzbekistan must carry correct product marking and declared characteristics consistent with the O'zDSt-adopted IEC standards: rated voltage/frequency, rated power, luminous flux, cap/base type, colour temperature, and safety markings per the IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 marking provisions. Self-ballasted LED lamps are assessed against the O'zDSt adoption of IEC 62560 for both safety and the declared-performance basis; integrated luminaires against IEC 60598. Marking and accompanying information generally need to be in a form acceptable to O'zStandart and customs （Uzbek, often Russian）. Confirm the required marking content and the declared-performance method （O'zDSt/IEC, not GB） for the product category, and ensure the importer's documentation reflects the as-shipped declared values.
summary.zh: 除核心电气安全外，进入乌兹别克斯坦的 LED 灯及灯具须载有与 O'zDSt 采纳的 IEC 标准一致的正确产品标识及标称特性：额定电压/频率、额定功率、光通量、灯头/灯座类型、色温，以及依据 IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 标识条款的安全标识。自镇流 LED 灯依据 O'zDSt 采纳的 IEC 62560 评定安全及标称性能基础；一体式灯具依据 IEC 60598。标识及随附信息通常须为 O'zStandart 及海关可接受的形式（乌兹别克语，且常为俄语）。请针对产品类别确认所需标识内容及标称性能方法（O'zDSt/IEC，而非 GB），并确保进口商文件反映实际出货标称值。
summary.zht: 除核心電氣安全外，進入烏茲別克的 LED 燈及燈具須載有與 O'zDSt 採納的 IEC 標準一致的正確產品標識及標稱特性：額定電壓/頻率、額定功率、光通量、燈頭/燈座類型、色溫，以及依據 IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 標識條款的安全標識。自鎮流 LED 燈依據 O'zDSt 採納的 IEC 62560 評定安全及標稱性能基礎；一體式燈具依據 IEC 60598。標識及隨附信息通常須為 O'zStandart 及海關可接受的形式（烏茲別克語，且常為俄語）。請針對產品類別確認所需標識內容及標稱性能方法（O'zDSt/IEC，而非 GB），並確保進口商文件反映實際出貨標稱值。

standards_or_laws: O'zDSt adoption of IEC 62560 — self-ballasted LED lamps (safety and declared characteristics)
O'zDSt adoption of IEC 60598 — luminaire marking and accompanying-information provisions

summary.en: China assesses self-ballasted LED lamp performance and safety under GB 24906 （safety）and GB/T 24908 （performance）, and luminaire marking under the GB 7000 series, with declared values following GB measurement methods and the China Energy Label for efficiency. Product marking and instructions are in Chinese for the domestic market. These GB-based declared values and Chinese-language markings are not accepted by O'zStandart, which requires O'zDSt/IEC-referenced declarations and Uzbek/Russian information.
summary.zh: 中国依据 GB 24906（安全）及 GB/T 24908（性能）评定自镇流 LED 灯的性能与安全，依据 GB 7000 系列评定灯具标识，标称值遵循 GB 测量方法，能效采用中国能效标识。产品标识及说明面向国内市场为中文。这些基于 GB 的标称值及中文标识不被 O'zStandart 接受，后者要求引用 O'zDSt/IEC 的声明及乌兹别克语/俄语信息。
summary.zht: 中國依據 GB 24906（安全）及 GB/T 24908（性能）評定自鎮流 LED 燈的性能與安全，依據 GB 7000 系列評定燈具標識，標稱值遵循 GB 測量方法，能效採用中國能效標識。產品標識及說明面向國內市場為中文。這些基於 GB 的標稱值及中文標識不被 O'zStandart 接受，後者要求引用 O'zDSt/IEC 的聲明及烏茲別克語/俄語信息。

standards_or_laws: GB 24906 / GB/T 24908 — self-ballasted LED lamp safety and performance
GB 7000 series — luminaire marking and accompanying information (Chinese-language domestic)

gap.en: China and Uzbekistan both rest on IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 for marking and declared performance, so the technical basis is aligned, but: (1) declared values must be presented per the O'zDSt-adopted IEC method, not the GB method, and a GB/T 24908 performance report is not automatically accepted by O'zStandart; (2) marking and accompanying information must be in Uzbek （and often Russian）, not Chinese; (3) the importer's documentation must match the as-shipped declared values to clear customs and support the conformity certificate/declaration; (4) the China Energy Label is irrelevant in Uzbekistan, where energy declarations follow the national programme/standard route （see leduz-ecodesign）. As with safety, an IEC CB-scheme report and IEC-referenced test data can shorten the route subject to O'zStandart acceptance — the gap is conformity-route and localisation, not core engineering.
gap.zh: 中国与乌兹别克斯坦的标识及标称性能均以 IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 为基础，故技术基础一致，但：（1）标称值须依据 O'zDSt 采纳的 IEC 方法（而非 GB 方法）呈现，GB/T 24908 性能报告不被 O'zStandart 自动接受；（2）标识及随附信息须采用乌兹别克语（且常为俄语），而非中文；（3）进口商文件须与实际出货标称值一致，以清关并支持合格证书/声明；（4）中国能效标识在乌兹别克斯坦无关，当地能效声明遵循国家计划/标准路径（见 leduz-ecodesign）。与安全一样，IEC CB 体系报告及引用 IEC 的检测数据在 O'zStandart 接受的前提下可缩短路径——差距在合格路径及本地化，而非核心工程。
gap.zht: 中國與烏茲別克的標識及標稱性能均以 IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 為基礎，故技術基礎一致，但：（1）標稱值須依據 O'zDSt 採納的 IEC 方法（而非 GB 方法）呈現，GB/T 24908 性能報告不被 O'zStandart 自動接受；（2）標識及隨附信息須採用烏茲別克語（且常為俄語），而非中文；（3）進口商文件須與實際出貨標稱值一致，以清關並支持合格證書/聲明；（4）中國能效標識在烏茲別克無關，當地能效聲明遵循國家計劃/標準路徑（見 leduz-ecodesign）。與安全一樣，IEC CB 體系報告及引用 IEC 的檢測數據在 O'zStandart 接受的前提下可縮短路徑——差距在合格路徑及本地化，而非核心工程。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (within conformity assessment) — product marking and declared characteristics per O'zDSt-adopted IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 required, in Uzbek/Russian, within O'zStandart certification or declaration
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 24906 / GB/T 24908 / GB 7000 marking and declared values (Chinese-language) within CCC scope for in-scope products

source.publisher: O'zStandart — Uzbek Agency for Technical Regulation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Product marking and declared characteristics for Uzbekistan follow the O'zDSt-adopted IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 method, in Uzbek/Russian, within an O'zStandart certification or declaration. GB-based declared values, Chinese-language marking, and the China Energy Label are not accepted. The technical basis is IEC-aligned so an IEC CB-scheme report and IEC-referenced data can shorten the route; the real work is the conformity route and localisation. Confirm required marking content and the declared-performance method for the product category before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌兹别克斯坦的产品标识及标称特性遵循 O'zDSt 采纳的 IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 方法，采用乌兹别克语/俄语，并在 O'zStandart 认证或声明内呈现。基于 GB 的标称值、中文标识及中国能效标识不被接受。技术基础与 IEC 对接，故 IEC CB 体系报告及引用 IEC 的数据可缩短路径；真正的工作在合格路径及本地化。出货前请针对产品类别确认所需标识内容及标称性能方法。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏茲別克的產品標識及標稱特性遵循 O'zDSt 採納的 IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 方法，採用烏茲別克語/俄語，並在 O'zStandart 認證或聲明內呈現。基於 GB 的標稱值、中文標識及中國能效標識不被接受。技術基礎與 IEC 對接，故 IEC CB 體系報告及引用 IEC 的數據可縮短路徑；真正的工作在合格路徑及本地化。出貨前請針對產品類別確認所需標識內容及標稱性能方法。
